name: Metsa Board Oyj
summary: Mets√É¬§ Board Oyj produces barrier boards, folding boxboard, food service boards, and white kraftliners worldwide. The company offers lightweight paperboards for consumer goods packaging, retail-ready, and food service applications, as well as market pulp products. It serves brand converters, brand owners, retailers, and merchants. The company was formerly known as M-real Corporation and changed its name to Mets√É¬§ Board Oyj in March 2012. Mets√É¬§ Board Oyj was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Espoo, Finland.
